steps.title: Establish the conversion factor from quarts to fluid ounces
steps.content:
We need to chain the given conversions: 4 cups = 1 quart and 8 fluid ounces = 1 cup. Multiply them together:
$$1 \text{ quart} = 4 \text{ cups} \times \frac{8 \text{ fluid ounces}}{1 \text{ cup}} = 32 \text{ fluid ounces}$$

steps.title: Find the equivalent number of fluid ounces
steps.content:
Apply the conversion factor to 68 quarts:
$$68 \text{ quarts} \times \frac{32 \text{ fluid ounces}}{1 \text{ quart}} = 68 \times 32 = 2176 \text{ fluid ounces}$$
